title: Clokify Intergration
excerpt: Hi all I have a question regarding  Clockify integration with Monday.com- Can multiple people  time track via Clockify for the same task/pulse as the Monday.com ? The time tracker on Monday.com does not allow for this.

posts.author: beabresani (Beatriz Bresani )
posts.cookedHtml: Hi all I have a question regarding Clockify integration with Monday.com- Can multiple people time track via Clockify for the same task/pulse as the Monday.com ? The time tracker on Monday.com does not allow for this.

posts.author: Contreforme (Sam Rossetti)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, we use clockif and it can record multiple people time track on a specific task. So the answer is yes.
As you said Monday doesn’t allow for this so we are in the process of making an internal monday to clockify bridge (PHP/MySQL) but it is for now very limited and a WIP. If you are interested i could describe or share the code. Let me know
